title: Schoenolirion albiflorum

It is a relatively rare species, found in specific mountainous regions of its native habitat.

The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory infections. The bioactive constituents of Schoenolirion albiflorum include alkaloids, glycosides, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
